{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231355081C2648D297DB039036CA"}"},"total":4259},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7098948294768018176","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔不错诶，知识储备也太丰富了吧！虽然说金手指可能有些大给主角也搞了很牛的背景，但是却不让人反感，有一说一平时看书挑剔的很，一般来评论都是打一星来吐槽的[笑哭]但是这个他还在连载我都看了一半了，搞的我好急作者快更千万别烂尾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652852941,"group_id":"7045269752092036135","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不与傻瓜论短长","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx3WwUhSItFi4htZlu+AYTI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/449915c97d6f4fa9957981652b589310~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795379&x-signature=pNwNiXRJ6c1RTfoHMxwjRcWRnU4%3D","user_id":"93878369130","user_name":"大挽拉面"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93878369130","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1659856859,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7045269752092036135","book_info":{"abstract":"（硬核鉴宝+非爽文+单女主+不修仙。）

　　他亲手仿制的瓷器，能让故宫的专家打了眼；

　　他随手雕的物件，能让自诩扬派大家改口称师；

　　别人视为瓦砾，而他奉为珍宝，转手就是千八百万。

　　他叫赵轩，一个自幼失明，却偶得天眼传承的年轻人。

　　捡漏不是请客吃饭，因为在他看来，并没有请客那么复杂。

　　赌石并非听天由命，因为他十赌十涨。

　　别人盯着乾隆宝玺流哈喇子，他却在苦寻天下至宝和氏璧。

　　十二生肖铜首，华夏九鼎，随侯珠，秦王照骨镜，九龙玉杯，

　　当一样样重宝展现在世人面前时，众人方知，

　　原来最富有的收藏并不是在故宫，而是在一个叫盛世九歌的古玩店里。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/490edc957e726010d24b5a5afcb27f91","author":"山峰","author_id":"","book_id":"7045269752092036135","book_name":"鬼瞳：寻宝天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":17,"name":"鉴宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=17&name=鉴宝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7045271438177075749","read_count":"34095","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1893597"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"881","tags":"都市日常,鉴宝,都市,神豪,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/374303483b9cabd3a0db9bdb4038b24d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429308&x-signature=AYhLgQnMYloBIQbuKbemjEHt9wU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3957872359387752","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.2556857e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231355081C2648D297DB039036CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_
